scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix packages/shared && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.ci:all: npm ci --prefix packages/shared && npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:workflows && npm run lint:bash
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint --prefix packages/shared -- --fix && npm run lint --prefix backend -- --fix && npm run lint --prefix frontend -- --fix
scripts.tsc: npm run tsc:shared && npm run tsc:backend && npm run tsc:frontend
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run tsc && npm run test
scripts.setup:playwright: npm exec --prefix frontend -- playwright install chromium
